_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to update the founder's name, story, values, and image. Replace the image src with the actual photo file path under /public/media/founder/.
name: Rameshwari Kalyankar
title: Founder, Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa
tagline: "Wellness is not a luxury reserved for a few — it is a necessity for every body that works hard, trains hard, hurts, heals, and strives to be its best."
story: Rameshwari Kalyankar is not your typical salon founder. She didn't come from a beauty school or a styling background — she came from something arguably more powerful: a lifetime of nurturing people, understanding their needs, and building genuine human connections in the heart of Kolhapur.

Her vision for Orchid was born from a simple but powerful observation: the city needed a real wellness destination — not just another salon. Athletes, bodybuilders, and sports persons needed therapeutic recovery. Senior citizens needed gentle, effective relief. Gym-goers carried soreness they couldn't shake. Frequent travellers arrived in Kolhapur exhausted, carrying the weight of long journeys. Working professionals battled chronic back pain and daily stress. Orchid was designed to serve all of them.

From the very beginning, Rameshwari insisted that Orchid's soul live in healing and recovery — with certified massage therapists, trained spa practitioners, and a team that takes time to understand each client's body, lifestyle, and goals before any treatment begins. The premium salon and skincare services were thoughtfully woven in, because true wellness includes looking as good as you feel.

Her exceptional people management instincts — honed through years of community involvement and building real relationships across Kolhapur — shaped the culture of Orchid from the ground up. She personally handpicked the team, set the standards for care and hospitality, and ensured that warmth, trust, and genuine attention are as central to the experience as any treatment on the menu.

Today, Orchid stands as Kolhapur's most promising wellness studio — a space where the sports community, the working professional, the senior citizen, and the beauty enthusiast all find exactly what they need, served with the same quiet excellence and personal touch that Rameshwari built this place to deliver.

values.title: Healing at Heart
values.description: We don't just pamper — we heal. Every treatment is designed with your body's recovery and long-term wellbeing as the priority.

values.title: Built for All Bodies
values.description: Athletes, bodybuilders, seniors, travellers, gym-goers, sports persons — Orchid was designed to serve every person at every stage of their wellness journey.

values.title: Community Trust
values.description: Built on word-of-mouth and genuine relationships — our reputation comes from clients who leave feeling measurably better, every single visit.

certifications: Sports Recovery & Therapeutic Massage Specialists on Staff

image.alt: Rameshwari Kalyankar, Founder of Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa
image._note: To replace: copy your photo to /public/media/founder/founder.png (or .jpg) and update the src above.
